Home.heroTitle: Daily essentials from trusted neighborhood stores
Home.heroDescription: Browse nearby sellers, compare local inventory, and shop fresh groceries and daily needs through a fast Indian-market checkout flow.
Home.benefitShopNearbyBody: Find stores serving your area and order from sellers your neighborhood already knows.
Home.benefitFreshBody: Browse groceries and daily needs from local sellers with practical inventory updates.
Home.benefitMobileBody: Add Khana Bazaar to your home screen for a focused app-like ordering experience.
Home.popularSubtitle: Start with local sellers and build your basket around what is available near you.
Home.emptyTitle: Stores are being prepared for your area.
Home.emptyBody: Check available sellers and start browsing as stores come online.
Home.sellerBandBody: Bring your catalog online, manage local inventory, and reach nearby customers through Khana Bazaar.

Login.subtitleEmail: Enter your email to sign in or create an account
Login.subtitleName: One last step — what should we call you?

Sell.metaDescription: Apply to sell on Khana Bazaar and bring your neighborhood store online for nearby shoppers.
Sell.heroBody: Reach nearby customers from your kirana, pharmacy, electronics counter, or general store while keeping control of your products, prices, and stock.
Sell.reviewNote: Seller applications are reviewed before stores go live and are usually completed within 1-2 business days.
Sell.whyTitle: Built for the way local stores already work
Sell.valueLocalReachBody: Show your store to nearby shoppers who already look for daily essentials in your area.
Sell.valueInventoryBody: Choose which products appear, set prices, and manage stock levels for your own storefront.
Sell.valueVerifiedBody: Keep the marketplace trusted with a simple review step before your store goes live.
Sell.valueCommerceBody: Built for neighborhood businesses that sell across kirana, pharmacy, electronics, and general retail.
Sell.howTitle: A simple path from signup to selling
Sell.step1Body: Start by confirming the contact details tied to your application.
Sell.step2Body: Share the business information needed to review your store.
Sell.step3Body: Your application is checked before the store is approved.
Sell.step4Body: Once approved, you can publish products and manage availability.
Sell.categoriesTitle: Start with the products your customers already ask for
Sell.previewTitle: See the basics before you go live
Sell.previewBody: The seller dashboard keeps the focus on total products, store status, inventory, stock, availability, and storefront visibility.
Sell.faq1A: No. Applications are reviewed before approval, and most are completed within 1-2 business days.
Sell.faq2A: Keep your verified email and mobile number, business details, GST number, FSSAI license, and bank account information ready.
Sell.faq3Q: What if my application is rejected?
Sell.faq3A: You can fix the missing details or documents and submit the application again from the seller signup flow.
Sell.faq4A: You can publish your store, add products, manage stock, and set availability for nearby shoppers.
Sell.faq5Q: Can I control products and prices?
Sell.faq5A: Yes. You decide which products are visible, how they are priced, and when items should be marked unavailable.
Sell.faq6A: Neighborhood stores such as kiranas, pharmacies, electronics shops, and general retail businesses can apply.
Sell.finalTitle: Ready to bring your store online?
Sell.finalBody: Start your seller application and keep your business details ready.

Errors.unknown: Something went wrong. Please try again.
Errors.otpExpired: OTP expired. Request a new one.
Errors.service_unavailable: This service is no longer offered by the store. Remove the items and try a different service.
Errors.service_mismatch: An item in your cart no longer belongs to this service. Remove it and try again.

Footer.tagline: Your neighbourhood stores, now at your fingertips. Shop fresh groceries & essentials from local sellers and pay instantly with UPI.
Footer.madeWith: Made with 🧡 for India's local sellers

Product.reviewsPlaceholder: Be the first to review this product at {storeName}.

Address.statesLoadError: Could not load states. Please refresh.
Address.noServiceableTitle: No saved address is within this store's delivery area.
Address.verifyHint: We'll show your address on a map so couriers can find you.
Address.verifyAdjustHint: Drag the map to fine-tune the pin if it's slightly off. Your typed address won't change.
Address.verifyMissingFields: Fill address line 1, city, state and a 6-digit pincode first.
Address.verifyNotFound: Couldn't locate that address on the map. Edit it and try again, or pin manually.
Address.verifyFailed: Address lookup failed. Please try again.

error.phone_invalid: That phone number doesn't look right.
error.phone_already_in_use: That number is already linked to another account.
error.otp_invalid: That code is incorrect or expired.

preferences.languageSubtitle: Choose the language for your dashboard.
preferences.notifyOrderEmail: Email me about my order status
preferences.notifyOrderSms: Text me about my order status
preferences.marketingOptIn: Send me promos and new-product emails

q1.question: How do I track my order?
q1.answer: Open the order from Orders to see its current status and timeline.

q2.question: How do I change my delivery address?
q2.answer: Manage saved addresses from the Addresses section; pick one at checkout.

q4.question: How do I cancel an order?
q4.answer: Pending orders can be cancelled from the order detail page.

q5.question: Why didn't I receive my OTP?
q5.answer: Check your spam folder or wait 60 seconds and request a new code.

support.contactSubtitle: Send us a message and we'll get back to you over email.
support.sent: Message sent. We'll be in touch.
support.sendError: Could not send your message. Please try again.
